meaning: n.约旦(位于西南亚的国家),约旦河
examples: Jordan reopened its border with Iraq.
The king and queen of Jordan are in residence.
The president ordered a review of U.S. economic aid to Jordan.
Abu Qatada was born in Bethlehem in 1960 and spent his early life in Jordan.
But Margie Jordan said she prefers Rovos Rail for the same route.
